# GK Vip Transfer

> Private airport, port and hotel transfer service on Kos island, Greece.
> Owner-operated by Georgia Kommata. Available 24/7 with real-time flight
> tracking, fixed prices and licensed, insured, English-speaking drivers.
> Book via the website form or WhatsApp +30 697 296 1560.

GK Vip Transfer provides pre-booked private transfers between Kos
International Airport (KGS), Kos Port and every town and resort on Kos
island: Kos Town, Kardamena, Kefalos, Tigaki, Mastichari, Marmari, Lambi,
Psalidi and Antimachia. All flights and ferries are tracked in real time
and there is no extra charge for delays. Prices are fixed and confirmed at
booking with no hidden fees. Payment is cash (EUR) or card at the end of
the ride; no prepayment is required.

Fleet:
- Peugeot 308 sedan: up to 4 passengers, 3 large suitcases
- Ford Transit van: up to 8 passengers, 6 large suitcases

Services: Kos Airport (KGS) transfers, Kos Port transfers (ferry and
cruise), hotel and resort transfers island-wide, private island tours
(Asklepion, Zia village, Neratzia Castle), and beach transfers (Paradise
Beach, Tigaki, Kefalos).

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://gkviptransfer.gr/): Services, fleet, FAQ and booking form for Kos transfers
- [Home (Greek)](https://gkviptransfer.gr/el/): Greek-language version of the site

## Booking & Contact

- [Booking form](https://gkviptransfer.gr/#booking): Reserve a transfer online; confirmation via WhatsApp
- WhatsApp / Phone: +30 697 296 1560 (24/7, instant quotes and confirmation)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://gkviptransfer.gr/sitemap-index.xml): XML sitemap index
- [Privacy Policy](https://gkviptransfer.gr/privacy/): How personal data and cookies are handled
- [Terms of Service](https://gkviptransfer.gr/terms/): Booking, payment and cancellation terms
